errorProviderFallback: Failed to fetch data from provider.
emptyDescription: Domains will appear automatically once you connect a DNS provider in settings.
loadRecordsError: Failed to load DNS records. Please try again.
deleteRecordError: Failed to delete DNS record. Please try again.
emptyRecordsDescription: This domain has no DNS records yet.
deleteConfirmDescription: The record "{name}" will be deleted from domain {domainName}. This action cannot be undone.
saveRecordError: Failed to save DNS record. Please try again.
valueInvalidIpv4Error: A record value must be a valid IPv4 address
valueInvalidIpv6Error: AAAA record value must be a valid IPv6 address
valueInvalidHostnameError: {type} record value must be a valid hostname
valueInvalidMxError: MX record value must be a valid mail server hostname
ttlInvalidError: TTL must be a positive integer
priorityRequiredError: MX record requires a numeric priority
priorityInvalidError: Priority must be a non-negative integer
